metadata.description: luna-brain — OSS Obsidian vault skeleton for Claude Code workflows. Marketplace ships SHA-pinned vault-knowledge + markdown-helper plugins. Pair with obsidian-second-brain (installed separately via its upstream install.sh) for PARA capture/daily/project skills.

plugins.name: claude-obsidian
plugins.description: Claude + Obsidian knowledge companion. Persistent wiki vault (Karpathy LLM Wiki pattern). Wiki query, save, ingest, lint, autoresearch, canvas. Pinned to SHA for supply-chain hygiene; bump deliberately.

plugins.name: obsidian
plugins.description: Steph Ango's Claude Skills for Obsidian: obsidian-markdown (OFM syntax), obsidian-bases, json-canvas, obsidian-cli, defuddle. Used by claude-obsidian + your own vault edits for correct Obsidian Flavored Markdown. Pinned to SHA.
